description: Perform a data quality review for Kailahun District. Run an outlier detection analysis for Kailahun District and its sub-units for the period January 2022 to December 2023 using the Z-score algorithm with a 3.0 threshold on health data sets such as Child Health, Mortality, or Malaria. Flag at least three suspicious values for follow-up. Export the outlier results list to /home/ga/Downloads/ and create a summary report at /home/ga/Desktop/kailahun_data_quality_report.txt describing 2-3 specific outliers found (including facility, data element, and value) along with your recommendations.
